stories.title: Follow live: Spurs, Thunder in tight Game 7 with F...
PSG beat Arsenal in shootout to retain UCL title
stories.summary: Paris Saint-Germain became just the second team to win back-to-back Champions League titles after rallying to beat Arsenal following a penalty shootout in Budapest, Hungary, on Saturday.

stories.title: Daigneault says JDub could return for NBA Finals
stories.summary: Thunder star Jalen Williams did not suffer a setback in his rehab from a left hamstring strain and could return for the NBA Finals if OKC advances.

stories.title: Tiafoe jaws with Faria, survives another 5-setter
stories.summary: Frances Tiafoe sweated out another grueling five-set victory at the French Open on Saturday, but not before getting into a verbal sparring match with Portuguese qualifier Jaime Faria in their third-round match.

stories.title: Tatis hits 451-foot HR to end MLB-worst drought
stories.summary: Fernando Tatis Jr., in an MLB-worst drought, finally hit his first homer of the season with a 451-foot solo shot to left field against the Nationals.
